image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about Type Ia supernovae than social media does.
Context visual: These explosions occur in binary star systems when a white dwarf siphons material from its companion.
Escalation visual: Once it reaches a critical mass, boom! A supernova erupts, shining brighter than entire galaxies.
Evidence visual: Type Ia supernovae are crucial for measuring cosmic distances, acting as reliable 'standard candles'.
Payoff visual: But there’s still uncertainty! Variations in their brightness can puzzle scientists.
Cta visual: Curious about more cosmic mysteries? Hit that follow button to explore the universe with us!
